title: Autocatalytic symmetry breaking and chiral amplification in a feedback network combining amino acid synthesis and ligation
author: Higgs, Paul
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Programs used for the paper "Autocatalytic symmetry breaking and chiral amplification in a feedback network combining amino acid synthesis and ligation" published PNAS 2025. 
 generalf.c - code for the constructive mechanism 
 generalb.c - code for the destructive mechanism
steps_raw:
Programs used for the paper "Autocatalytic symmetry breaking and chiral amplification in a feedback network combining amino acid synthesis and ligation" published PNAS 2025. 
 generalf.c - code for the constructive mechanism 
 generalb.c - code for the destructive mechanism
